_meta.wait_gate: submit only after >=1 independent third-party source (NOT authored by Chudi) covers the framework by name

descriptions.en: Open-source framework for measuring whether AI answer engines can find, recommend, and cite a website

statements.label: instance of
statements.note: Q1130645 is open-source software. Alternative: Q188860 (free software) or Q21127166 (software framework). Operator picks based on which feels most accurate. Methodology-only (no installable artifact) might prefer Q15621286 (intellectual work) or Q1417149 (methodology); current draft uses open-source software because the framework is published with a public GitHub repo.

statements.label: instance of
statements.note: Dual classification: framework is both an open-source artifact AND a measurement methodology. Both classifications are valid on Wikidata.

statements.label: official website
statements.note: Canonical framework spec lives at chudi.dev/framework v1.1.0 (observed 2026-04-18).

statements.note: If Chudi Nnorukam does not yet have a Q-item, this statement can be deferred or use P2093 (author name string) with value 'Chudi Nnorukam' as fallback.

statements.label: inception
statements.note: Per operator prompt: 2026-Q1. Use year precision (P571 supports calendar-precision qualifier). Adjust to a specific month/day if a public commit or release tag pins the inception more precisely.

statements.label: source code repository URL
statements.note: Public GitHub repo containing FRAMEWORK.md + GLOSSARY.md + overlays/.

statements.label: copyright license
statements.value_qid_pending: <verify actual license from LICENSE file in repo before submission>
statements.note: If MIT, value_qid is Q334661. If Apache 2.0, Q309877. If GPL-3.0, Q10513450. DO NOT submit without verifying the actual license.

statements.label: described at URL
statements.note: FCC guest post URL (verify exact slug from chudi-blog drafts/ or live URL before submission). This is the highest-DA third-party citation currently available.

all.label: reference URL
all.note: INDEPENDENCE CAVEAT: this post was authored by Chudi Nnorukam, so it is not strictly an independent secondary source. Wikidata patrollers may flag it as such.

operator_pre_submit_checklist: Verify exact LICENSE in github.com/ChudiNnorukam/ai-visibility-readiness (MIT? Apache? GPL?) and update P275 value_qid
Verify exact FCC guest post URL slug
Decide whether to create a Q-item for Chudi Nnorukam first (so P50 author has a Q-link) or fall back to P2093 author name string
Wait gate: confirm at least ONE third-party article (NOT authored by Chudi) covers the framework by name; cite it as a second P854 reference for stronger Criterion 2 backing

Decide between Q1130645 (open-source software) vs Q21127166 (software framework) vs Q1417149 (methodology) for the primary P31 statement; the dual-instance-of in this draft may invite patroller pushback
